original_text: Key risks warrant caution and support our Hold rather than Buy recommendation. Adobe Inc.'s liquidity appears tight with a current ratio of approximately 1.00 in Q4 2025 [K008][C011]. Leverage remains moderate with a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.57 [K009] and net debt of $1,217 million [K010]. Revenue volatility across fiscal 2025 quarters, ranging from -8.21% to +3.44% YoY [K001], suggests ongoing competitive and market positioning risks.

changes_summary: Removed C011 from the current ratio citation as it is an income statement chunk that does not contain balance sheet data (current assets or current liabilities) needed to support the current ratio claim. Only K008 correctly supports this calculation. All other claims and citations remain unchanged as they are properly supported by the available evidence.
